'''Risha''' was the first [[Planet/Legends|planet]] orbiting the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Rish]] in the [[Rishi system/Legends|Rishi system]]. Located in the [[Abrion sector/Legends|Abrion sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], it was a toxic hothouse. The planet did not support [[Human/Legends|Human]]-like life, as its surface was covered with molten rivers and steaming lakes of chemicals.<ref name="TTS" />
